section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 23 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 23/04/2024
DCE iron ore futures continued to fall today. The main contract I2409 closed at 849. an decreaseof 1.91% throughout the day; some traders were negative to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchasing enthusiasm is not high.
